---
title: "run_experiment_4_skm_budiaji"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(kmed)
library(mclust)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(jsonlite)

# ── Funciones ─────────────────────────────────────────
permutations <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 1) return(matrix(x))
  do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(x), function(i) {
    cbind(x[i], permutations(x[-i]))
  }))
}

adjusted_score <- function(y_pred, y_true, metric) {
  unique_pred <- sort(unique(y_pred))
  unique_true <- sort(unique(y_true))
  perms_list  <- permutations(unique_true)
  
  best_score  <- -Inf
  best_labels <- NULL
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(perms_list))) {
    perm            <- perms_list[i, ]
    perm_dict       <- setNames(perm, unique_pred)
    permuted_labels <- perm_dict[as.character(y_pred)]
    score           <- metric(y_true, permuted_labels)
    if (score > best_score) {
      best_score  <- score
      best_labels <- permuted_labels
    }
  }
  list(adj_score = best_score, adj_cluster_labels = unname(best_labels))
}

accuracy <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  mean(as.integer(y_true) == as.integer(y_pred))
}

# ── Rutas base ─────────────────────────────────────────
ruta_folder        <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/simulations_data"
processed_data_dir <- "../../../data/processed_data"

# ── Cargar CSVs de simulación (solo los que existen) ──
rutas_completas  <- list.files(path = ruta_folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
nombres_archivos <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(rutas_completas))
lista_csvs       <- lapply(rutas_completas, read.csv)
names(lista_csvs) <- nombres_archivos

# ── Helper: cargar datos reales desde parquet + metadata ──
load_real_data <- function(data_id, processed_data_dir) {
  metadata_path <- file.path(processed_data_dir, sprintf("metadata_%s.json",     data_id))
  parquet_path  <- file.path(processed_data_dir, sprintf("%s_processed.parquet", data_id))
  
  metadata <- fromJSON(metadata_path, simplifyVector = TRUE)
  df       <- as.data.frame(read_parquet(parquet_path))
  
  quant_cols <- as.character(unlist(metadata$quant_predictors))
  bin_cols   <- as.character(unlist(metadata$binary_predictors))
  cat_cols   <- as.character(unlist(metadata$multiclass_predictors))
  
  n_quant <- length(quant_cols)
  n_bin   <- length(bin_cols)
  n_cat   <- length(cat_cols)
  
  feature_cols <- c(quant_cols, bin_cols, cat_cols)
  
  list(
    X     = df[, feature_cols, drop = FALSE],
    y     = df[[as.character(metadata$response)]],
    idnum = if (n_quant > 0) seq(1, n_quant)                                   else integer(0),
    idbin = if (n_bin   > 0) seq(n_quant + 1, n_quant + n_bin)                 else integer(0),
    idcat = if (n_cat   > 0) seq(n_quant + n_bin + 1, n_quant + n_bin + n_cat) else integer(0)
  )
}

# ── Configuración ─────────────────────────────────────
EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE <- 123
SIMULATION_DATA_IDS <- c(
  "simulation_base",
  "simulation_size_outliers_1"
)
REAL_DATA_IDS <- c(
  "dubai_houses",
  "heart_disease",
  "kc_houses_ternary"
)
DATA_IDS     <- c(SIMULATION_DATA_IDS, REAL_DATA_IDS)
ITERS        <- 0:29
SEEDING_SKM  <- 20
ITERATE_SKM  <- 10
IDNUM_SKM    <- 1:4
IDBIN_SKM    <- 5:6
IDCAT_SKM    <- 7:8
DISTANCE_SKM <- "gower"

# ── Directorios de salida ─────────────────────────────
output_dir <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/results"
temp_dir   <- file.path(output_dir, "temp")
dir.create(temp_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Acumuladores globales ─────────────────────────────
all_results     <- list()
summary_rows    <- list()

# ── Loop principal ────────────────────────────────────
for (data_id in DATA_IDS) {
  
  temp_file <- file.path(temp_dir, sprintf("results_%s.csv", data_id))
  is_real   <- data_id %in% REAL_DATA_IDS
  
  if (file.exists(temp_file)) {
    cat(sprintf("⏭️  %s ya procesado, saltando...\n", data_id))
    cached <- read.csv(temp_file)
    all_results[[data_id]] <- cached
    summary_rows[[data_id]] <- cached %>%
      summarise(
        data_id           = first(data_id),
        mean_adj_accuracy = mean(adj_acc,      na.rm = TRUE),
        std_adj_accuracy  = sd(adj_acc,        na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_ari          = mean(ARI,          na.rm = TRUE),
        std_ari           = sd(ARI,            na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_time         = mean(elapsed_time, na.rm = TRUE),
        std_time          = sd(elapsed_time,   na.rm = TRUE),
        prop_status_error = 0.0,
        model_name        = "skm"
      )
    next
  }

  # ── Rama datos reales: una sola ejecución ──
  if (is_real) {
    tryCatch({
      real_data <- load_real_data(data_id, processed_data_dir)
      cat(sprintf("[%s] Datos reales cargados: %d filas, %d columnas\n",
                  data_id, nrow(real_data$X), ncol(real_data$X)))
      
      y_true <- as.integer(real_data$y)
      nclust <- length(unique(y_true))
      
      start <- proc.time()
      
      dist_X <- distmix(real_data$X, method = DISTANCE_SKM,
                        idnum = real_data$idnum,
                        idbin = real_data$idbin,
                        idcat = real_data$idcat)
      
      set.seed(EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE)
      clustering_result <- skm(dist_X, ncluster = nclust,
                               seeding = SEEDING_SKM, iterate = ITERATE_SKM)
      
      end <- proc.time()
      
      y_pred      <- clustering_result$cluster
      adj_acc_val <- adjusted_score(y_pred, y_true, accuracy)$adj_score
      ari_val     <- adjustedRandIndex(y_true, y_pred)
      elapsed_val <- (end - start)["elapsed"]
      
      # Una sola fila real — sin iteraciones
      row_real <- data.frame(
        data_id      = data_id,
        iteration    = NA_integer_,
        adj_acc      = adj_acc_val,
        ARI          = ari_val,
        elapsed_time = elapsed_val
      )
      
      write.csv(row_real, temp_file, row.names = FALSE)
      cat(sprintf("✅ %s completado y guardado en temporal.\n", data_id))
      
      all_results[[data_id]] <- row_real
      summary_rows[[data_id]] <- data.frame(
        data_id           = data_id,
        mean_adj_accuracy = adj_acc_val,
        std_adj_accuracy  = NA_real_,
        mean_ari          = ari_val,
        std_ari           = NA_real_,
        mean_time         = elapsed_val,
        std_time          = NA_real_,
        prop_status_error = 0.0,
        model_name        = "skm"
      )
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("❌ [%s] Error: %s\n", data_id, e$message))
    })
    next
  }

  # ── Rama simulaciones: bucle sobre iteraciones ──
  results_data_id <- data.frame(
    data_id      = character(),
    iteration    = integer(),
    adj_acc      = numeric(),
    ARI          = numeric(),
    elapsed_time = numeric()
  )
  
  all_ok <- TRUE
  
  for (i in ITERS) {
    cat(sprintf("Procesando %s, iter %d ...\n", data_id, i))
    
    tryCatch({
      
      x_key  <- sprintf("X_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)
      y_key  <- sprintf("y_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)
      X_df   <- as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[x_key]])
      y_true <- as.integer(as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[y_key]])[, 1])
      nclust <- length(unique(y_true))
      
      start <- proc.time()
      
      dist_X <- distmix(X_df, method = DISTANCE_SKM,
                        idnum = IDNUM_SKM, idbin = IDBIN_SKM, idcat = IDCAT_SKM)
      
      set.seed(EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE)
      clustering_result <- skm(dist_X, ncluster = nclust,
                               seeding = SEEDING_SKM, iterate = ITERATE_SKM)
      
      end <- proc.time()
      
      y_pred <- clustering_result$cluster
      
      results_data_id <- rbind(results_data_id, data.frame(
        data_id      = data_id,
        iteration    = i,
        adj_acc      = adjusted_score(y_pred, y_true, accuracy)$adj_score,
        ARI          = adjustedRandIndex(y_true, y_pred),
        elapsed_time = (end - start)["elapsed"]
      ))
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  !! Error en %s iter %d: %s\n", data_id, i, e$message))
      all_ok <<- FALSE
    })
  }
  
  if (all_ok) {
    write.csv(results_data_id, temp_file, row.names = FALSE)
    cat(sprintf("✅ %s completado y guardado en temporal.\n", data_id))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("⚠️  %s completado con errores, no se guarda temporal.\n", data_id))
  }
  
  all_results[[data_id]] <- results_data_id
  summary_rows[[data_id]] <- results_data_id %>%
    summarise(
      data_id           = first(data_id),
      mean_adj_accuracy = mean(adj_acc,      na.rm = TRUE),
      std_adj_accuracy  = sd(adj_acc,        na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_ari          = mean(ARI,          na.rm = TRUE),
      std_ari           = sd(ARI,            na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_time         = mean(elapsed_time, na.rm = TRUE),
      std_time          = sd(elapsed_time,   na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_status_error = 0.0,
      model_name        = "skm"
    )
}

# ── Consolidación final ───────────────────────────────
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  cat("❌ No hay ningún resultado disponible. No se genera resultado final.\n")
} else {
  missing <- setdiff(DATA_IDS, names(all_results))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    cat("⚠️  Faltan resultados para:\n")
    cat(paste(" -", missing, collapse = "\n"), "\n")
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("✅ Consolidando %d/%d data_ids completados...\n", length(all_results), length(DATA_IDS)))
  
  results         <- do.call(rbind, all_results)
  summary_results <- do.call(rbind, summary_rows)
  
  write.csv(results,
            file.path(output_dir, "results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(summary_results,
            file.path(output_dir, "avg_results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("💾 Resultados finales guardados.\n")
}
```
```{r}
library(kmed)
library(mclust)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(jsonlite)

# ── Funciones ─────────────────────────────────────────
permutations <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 1) return(matrix(x))
  do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(x), function(i) {
    cbind(x[i], permutations(x[-i]))
  }))
}

adjusted_score <- function(y_pred, y_true, metric) {
  unique_pred <- sort(unique(y_pred))
  unique_true <- sort(unique(y_true))
  perms_list  <- permutations(unique_true)
  
  best_score  <- -Inf
  best_labels <- NULL
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(perms_list))) {
    perm            <- perms_list[i, ]
    perm_dict       <- setNames(perm, unique_pred)
    permuted_labels <- perm_dict[as.character(y_pred)]
    score           <- metric(y_true, permuted_labels)
    if (score > best_score) {
      best_score  <- score
      best_labels <- permuted_labels
    }
  }
  list(adj_score = best_score, adj_cluster_labels = unname(best_labels))
}

accuracy <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  mean(as.integer(y_true) == as.integer(y_pred))
}

# ── Rutas base ─────────────────────────────────────────
ruta_folder        <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/simulations_data"
processed_data_dir <- "../../../data/processed_data"

# ── Cargar CSVs de simulación (solo los que existen) ──
rutas_completas  <- list.files(path = ruta_folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
nombres_archivos <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(rutas_completas))
lista_csvs       <- lapply(rutas_completas, read.csv)
names(lista_csvs) <- nombres_archivos

# ── Helper: cargar datos reales desde parquet + metadata ──
load_real_data <- function(data_id, processed_data_dir) {
  metadata_path <- file.path(processed_data_dir, sprintf("metadata_%s.json",     data_id))
  parquet_path  <- file.path(processed_data_dir, sprintf("%s_processed.parquet", data_id))
  
  metadata <- fromJSON(metadata_path, simplifyVector = TRUE)
  df       <- as.data.frame(read_parquet(parquet_path))
  
  quant_cols <- as.character(unlist(metadata$quant_predictors))
  bin_cols   <- as.character(unlist(metadata$binary_predictors))
  cat_cols   <- as.character(unlist(metadata$multiclass_predictors))
  
  # Eliminar strings vacíos o NAs que puedan venir de arrays JSON vacíos
  quant_cols <- quant_cols[nzchar(quant_cols) & !is.na(quant_cols)]
  bin_cols   <- bin_cols[nzchar(bin_cols)     & !is.na(bin_cols)]
  cat_cols   <- cat_cols[nzchar(cat_cols)     & !is.na(cat_cols)]
  
  n_quant <- length(quant_cols)
  n_bin   <- length(bin_cols)
  n_cat   <- length(cat_cols)
  
  feature_cols <- c(quant_cols, bin_cols, cat_cols)
  
  cat(sprintf("  -> idnum=%s | idbin=%s | idcat=%s\n",
              paste(if (n_quant > 0) seq(1, n_quant) else "∅", collapse = ","),
              paste(if (n_bin   > 0) seq(n_quant + 1, n_quant + n_bin) else "∅", collapse = ","),
              paste(if (n_cat   > 0) seq(n_quant + n_bin + 1, n_quant + n_bin + n_cat) else "∅", collapse = ",")))
  
  list(
    X     = df[, feature_cols, drop = FALSE],
    y     = df[[as.character(metadata$response)]],
    idnum = if (n_quant > 0) seq(1, n_quant)                                   else integer(0),
    idbin = if (n_bin   > 0) seq(n_quant + 1, n_quant + n_bin)                 else integer(0),
    idcat = if (n_cat   > 0) seq(n_quant + n_bin + 1, n_quant + n_bin + n_cat) else integer(0)
  )
}

# ── Configuración ─────────────────────────────────────
EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE <- 123
SIMULATION_DATA_IDS <- c(
  "simulation_base",
  "simulation_outliers_2",
  "simulation_outliers_2a",
  "simulation_outliers_2b",
  "simulation_outliers_6",
  "simulation_outliers_6a",
  "simulation_outliers_7",
  "simulation_outliers_8",
  "simulation_sphericity_3",
  "simulation_sphericity_outliers_1",
  "simulation_sphericity_outliers_2",
  "simulation_imbalance_1",
  "simulation_imbalance_2",
  "simulation_imbalance_outliers_1",
  "simulation_sphericity_imbalance_1",
  "simulation_separation_2",
  "simulation_separation_outliers_1",
  "simulation_separation_sphericity_1",
  "simulation_size_outliers_1"
)
REAL_DATA_IDS <- c(
  "dubai_houses",
  "heart_disease",
  "kc_houses_ternary"
)
DATA_IDS     <- c(SIMULATION_DATA_IDS, REAL_DATA_IDS)
ITERS        <- 0:29
SEEDING_SKM  <- 20
ITERATE_SKM  <- 10
IDNUM_SKM    <- 1:4
IDBIN_SKM    <- 5:6
IDCAT_SKM    <- 7:8
DISTANCE_SKM <- "gower"

# ── Directorios de salida ─────────────────────────────
output_dir <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/results"
temp_dir   <- file.path(output_dir, "temp")
dir.create(temp_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Acumuladores globales ─────────────────────────────
all_results  <- list()
summary_rows <- list()

# ── Loop principal ────────────────────────────────────
for (data_id in DATA_IDS) {
  
  temp_file <- file.path(temp_dir, sprintf("results_%s.csv", data_id))
  is_real   <- data_id %in% REAL_DATA_IDS
  
  if (file.exists(temp_file)) {
    cat(sprintf("⏭️  %s ya procesado, saltando...\n", data_id))
    cached <- read.csv(temp_file)
    all_results[[data_id]] <- cached
    summary_rows[[data_id]] <- cached %>%
      summarise(
        data_id           = first(data_id),
        mean_adj_accuracy = mean(adj_acc,      na.rm = TRUE),
        std_adj_accuracy  = sd(adj_acc,        na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_ari          = mean(ARI,          na.rm = TRUE),
        std_ari           = sd(ARI,            na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_time         = mean(elapsed_time, na.rm = TRUE),
        std_time          = sd(elapsed_time,   na.rm = TRUE),
        prop_status_error = 0.0,
        model_name        = "skm"
      )
    next
  }

  # ── Rama datos reales: una sola ejecución ──
  if (is_real) {
    tryCatch({
      real_data <- load_real_data(data_id, processed_data_dir)
      cat(sprintf("[%s] Datos reales cargados: %d filas, %d columnas\n",
                  data_id, nrow(real_data$X), ncol(real_data$X)))
      
      y_true <- as.integer(real_data$y)
      
      # Eliminar filas con NAs en X
      complete_idx <- complete.cases(real_data$X)
      n_removed    <- sum(!complete_idx)
      if (n_removed > 0) {
        cat(sprintf("  -> Eliminando %d filas con NAs (de %d totales)\n", n_removed, length(complete_idx)))
      }
      X_clean <- real_data$X[complete_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_true  <- y_true[complete_idx]
      
      # Diagnóstico: NAs por columna tras limpieza
      na_counts <- colSums(is.na(X_clean))
      if (any(na_counts > 0)) {
        cat("  -> NAs restantes por columna:\n")
        print(na_counts[na_counts > 0])
      }
      
      # Forzar columnas categóricas y binarias a factor sin niveles vacíos
      for (j in c(real_data$idcat, real_data$idbin)) {
        X_clean[[j]] <- droplevels(as.factor(X_clean[[j]]))
      }
      
      nclust <- length(unique(y_true))
      
      start <- proc.time()
      
      dist_X <- distmix(X_clean, method = DISTANCE_SKM,
                        idnum = real_data$idnum,
                        idbin = real_data$idbin,
                        idcat = real_data$idcat)
      
      set.seed(EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE)
      clustering_result <- skm(dist_X, ncluster = nclust,
                               seeding = SEEDING_SKM, iterate = ITERATE_SKM)
      
      end <- proc.time()
      
      y_pred      <- clustering_result$cluster
      adj_acc_val <- adjusted_score(y_pred, y_true, accuracy)$adj_score
      ari_val     <- adjustedRandIndex(y_true, y_pred)
      elapsed_val <- (end - start)["elapsed"]
      
      row_real <- data.frame(
        data_id      = data_id,
        iteration    = NA_integer_,
        adj_acc      = adj_acc_val,
        ARI          = ari_val,
        elapsed_time = elapsed_val
      )
      
      write.csv(row_real, temp_file, row.names = FALSE)
      cat(sprintf("✅ %s completado y guardado en temporal.\n", data_id))
      
      all_results[[data_id]] <- row_real
      summary_rows[[data_id]] <- data.frame(
        data_id           = data_id,
        mean_adj_accuracy = adj_acc_val,
        std_adj_accuracy  = NA_real_,
        mean_ari          = ari_val,
        std_ari           = NA_real_,
        mean_time         = elapsed_val,
        std_time          = NA_real_,
        prop_status_error = 0.0,
        model_name        = "skm"
      )
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("❌ [%s] Error: %s\n", data_id, e$message))
    })
    next
  }

  # ── Rama simulaciones: bucle sobre iteraciones ──
  results_data_id <- data.frame(
    data_id      = character(),
    iteration    = integer(),
    adj_acc      = numeric(),
    ARI          = numeric(),
    elapsed_time = numeric()
  )
  
  all_ok <- TRUE
  
  for (i in ITERS) {
    cat(sprintf("Procesando %s, iter %d ...\n", data_id, i))
    
    tryCatch({
      
      x_key  <- sprintf("X_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)
      y_key  <- sprintf("y_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)
      X_df   <- as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[x_key]])
      y_true <- as.integer(as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[y_key]])[, 1])
      nclust <- length(unique(y_true))
      
      start <- proc.time()
      
      dist_X <- distmix(X_df, method = DISTANCE_SKM,
                        idnum = IDNUM_SKM, idbin = IDBIN_SKM, idcat = IDCAT_SKM)
      
      set.seed(EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE)
      clustering_result <- skm(dist_X, ncluster = nclust,
                               seeding = SEEDING_SKM, iterate = ITERATE_SKM)
      
      end <- proc.time()
      
      y_pred <- clustering_result$cluster
      
      results_data_id <- rbind(results_data_id, data.frame(
        data_id      = data_id,
        iteration    = i,
        adj_acc      = adjusted_score(y_pred, y_true, accuracy)$adj_score,
        ARI          = adjustedRandIndex(y_true, y_pred),
        elapsed_time = (end - start)["elapsed"]
      ))
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  !! Error en %s iter %d: %s\n", data_id, i, e$message))
      all_ok <<- FALSE
    })
  }
  
  if (all_ok) {
    write.csv(results_data_id, temp_file, row.names = FALSE)
    cat(sprintf("✅ %s completado y guardado en temporal.\n", data_id))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("⚠️  %s completado con errores, no se guarda temporal.\n", data_id))
  }
  
  all_results[[data_id]] <- results_data_id
  summary_rows[[data_id]] <- results_data_id %>%
    summarise(
      data_id           = first(data_id),
      mean_adj_accuracy = mean(adj_acc,      na.rm = TRUE),
      std_adj_accuracy  = sd(adj_acc,        na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_ari          = mean(ARI,          na.rm = TRUE),
      std_ari           = sd(ARI,            na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_time         = mean(elapsed_time, na.rm = TRUE),
      std_time          = sd(elapsed_time,   na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_status_error = 0.0,
      model_name        = "skm"
    )
}

# ── Consolidación final ───────────────────────────────
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  cat("❌ No hay ningún resultado disponible. No se genera resultado final.\n")
} else {
  missing <- setdiff(DATA_IDS, names(all_results))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    cat("⚠️  Faltan resultados para:\n")
    cat(paste(" -", missing, collapse = "\n"), "\n")
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("✅ Consolidando %d/%d data_ids completados...\n", length(all_results), length(DATA_IDS)))
  
  results         <- do.call(rbind, all_results)
  summary_results <- do.call(rbind, summary_rows)
  
  write.csv(results,
            file.path(output_dir, "results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(summary_results,
            file.path(output_dir, "avg_results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("💾 Resultados finales guardados.\n")
}
```

```{r}
# DIAGNÓSTICO TEMPORAL — ejecutar una vez para inspeccionar kc_houses_ternary
real_data_diag <- load_real_data("kc_houses_ternary", processed_data_dir)
cat("NAs por columna:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(real_data_diag$X)))
cat("NaNs por columna:\n")
print(colSums(is.nan(as.matrix(real_data_diag$X))))
cat("Valores vacíos en columnas cat:\n")
for (j in real_data_diag$idcat) {
  vals <- real_data_diag$X[[j]]
  cat(sprintf("  col %d (%s): NAs=%d, blancos=%d, NaNs=%d\n",
              j, names(real_data_diag$X)[j],
              sum(is.na(vals)),
              sum(nzchar(as.character(vals)) == FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
              sum(is.nan(as.numeric(vals)))))
}
```



```{r}
results
```

```{r}
summary_results
```
